View this page

Parsing¶

YAML and JSON parsing for contracts and schemas.

Loading Contracts¶

from griot_core import (
    load_contract,
    load_contract_from_string,
    load_contract_from_dict,
)

# From file
contract = load_contract("path/to/contract.yaml")

# From string
contract = load_contract_from_string(yaml_content)

# From dict
contract = load_contract_from_dict(contract_dict)

YAML Parser¶

from griot_core.parsing import parse_contract_yaml, parse_schema_yaml

contract = parse_contract_yaml(yaml_string)
schema = parse_schema_yaml(yaml_string)

JSON Parser¶

from griot_core.parsing import parse_contract_json, parse_schema_json

contract = parse_contract_json(json_string)
schema = parse_schema_json(json_string)

Structure Validation¶

from griot_core import validate_contract_structure

result = validate_contract_structure(contract)

if not result.is_valid:
    for issue in result.issues:
        print(f"[{issue.severity}] {issue.path}: {issue.message}")

API Reference¶

Griot Core Parsing Module.

This module provides parsers for loading contracts and schemas from YAML and JSON formats.

griot_core.parsing.parse_contract_yaml(yaml_content)[source]¶

Parse a YAML string into a Contract object.

Parameters:

yaml_content (str) – YAML string containing the contract definition

Returns:

Contract object

Raises:

ValueError – If the YAML is invalid or missing required fields

Return type:

Contract

griot_core.parsing.parse_schema_yaml(yaml_content)[source]¶

Parse a YAML string into a Schema object.

Parameters:

yaml_content (str) – YAML string containing the schema definition

Returns:

Schema object

Raises:

ValueError – If the YAML is invalid or missing required fields

Return type:

Schema

griot_core.parsing.load_contract_from_file(file_path)[source]¶

Load a Contract from a YAML file.

Parameters:

file_path (str | Path) – Path to the YAML file

Returns:

Contract object

Return type:

Contract

griot_core.parsing.load_schema_from_file(file_path)[source]¶

Load a Schema from a YAML file.

Parameters:

file_path (str | Path) – Path to the YAML file

Returns:

Schema object

Return type:

Schema

griot_core.parsing.parse_contract_json(json_content)[source]¶

Parse a JSON string into a Contract object.

Parameters:

json_content (str) – JSON string containing the contract definition

Returns:

Contract object

Raises:

ValueError – If the JSON is invalid or missing required fields

Return type:

Contract

griot_core.parsing.parse_schema_json(json_content)[source]¶

Parse a JSON string into a Schema object.

Parameters:

json_content (str) – JSON string containing the schema definition

Returns:

Schema object

Raises:

ValueError – If the JSON is invalid or missing required fields

Return type:

Schema

griot_core.parsing.validate_contract_structure(contract)[source]¶

Validate the structure of a Contract.

Checks: - Required fields are present - Status is valid - At least one schema (ref or inline) - Schema properties are valid - Check definitions are complete

Parameters:

contract (Contract) – The Contract to validate

Returns:

StructureValidationResult with any issues found

Return type:

StructureValidationResult

griot_core.parsing.validate_schema_structure(schema, base_path='$')[source]¶

Validate the structure of a Schema.

Checks: - Required fields are present - Properties are valid - Checks are complete

Parameters:

  • schema (Schema) – The Schema to validate

  • base_path (str) – Base JSON path for issue locations

Returns:

StructureValidationResult with any issues found

Return type:

StructureValidationResult

class griot_core.parsing.ValidationIssue(path, message, severity=IssueSeverity.ERROR, code='')[source]¶

A validation issue found during structure validation.

Parameters:

  • path (str)

  • message (str)

  • severity (IssueSeverity)

  • code (str)

path¶

JSON path to the issue location (e.g., “$.schema[0].properties[1].name”)

Type:

str

message¶

Human-readable description of the issue

Type:

str

severity¶

How severe the issue is

Type:

griot_core.parsing.validator.IssueSeverity

code¶

Machine-readable error code

Type:

str

code: str = ''¶
severity: IssueSeverity = 'error'¶
path: str¶
message: str¶
class griot_core.parsing.StructureValidationResult(is_valid, issues=<factory>, error_count=0, warning_count=0)[source]¶

Result of structure validation.

Parameters:

  • is_valid (bool)

  • issues (List[ValidationIssue])

  • error_count (int)

  • warning_count (int)

is_valid¶

True if no errors (warnings/info allowed)

Type:

bool

issues¶

List of validation issues found

Type:

List[griot_core.parsing.validator.ValidationIssue]

error_count¶

Number of error-level issues

Type:

int

warning_count¶

Number of warning-level issues

Type:

int

add_issue(issue)[source]¶

Add an issue to the result.

Parameters:

issue (ValidationIssue)

Return type:

None

error_count: int = 0¶
classmethod valid()[source]¶

Create a valid result with no issues.

Return type:

StructureValidationResult

warning_count: int = 0¶
is_valid: bool¶
issues: List[ValidationIssue]¶
